name: Accustem Sciences Inc.
business: Accustem Sciences is a clinical stage diagnostics company developing and commercializing genomic tests, including the MSC test for lung nodule classification and the StemPrintER test for early stage breast cancer recurrence risk.
sellsTo: patients with early stage breast cancer

exposures.sentence: Our plan is to develop and commercialize a suite of novel genomic tests that support decision making along the entire continuum of oncology care.

catalysts.event: filing of CMS coverage policy application for MSC test
catalysts.sentence: An application for a CMS coverage policy of the MSC test was filed with Novitas Solutions, Inc, a Medicare reimbursement contractor in November, 2025.

catalysts.event: completion of milestones to enable launch of MSC and StemPrintER
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate that it will take approximately 6 months to complete these milestones.

tamClaims.claim: Total US market opportunity greater than $6.3 billion annually
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate this market opportunity represents more than $6.3 billion in annual revenue in the US, where we will focus our initial commercialization efforts.

tamClaims.claim: MSC serviceable market opportunity of more than $5.5 billion
tamClaims.sentence: Our plan is to commercialize MSC for the 1.6 million patients diagnosed with lung nodules in the US each year, translating to a serviceable market opportunity of more than $5.5 billion.

tamClaims.claim: StemPrintER serviceable market opportunity of more than $800 million annually
tamClaims.sentence: Our plan is to commercialize StemPrintER for early stage breast cancer, representing an estimated US population of 214,000 patients and a serviceable market opportunity of more than $800 million annually.
